title: pitcairnia hemsleyana
intro: Pitcairnia hemsleyana, also known as the Red Voodoo or Hemsley's Air Plant, is a type of epiphytic bromeliad native to Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Pitcairnia hemsleyana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal skin irritations and prevent the spread of infections. Herbal preparations of Pitcairnia hemsleyana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using the plant's essential oil to create a topical treatment for skin conditions.
